speaker: REGAN
text: But are my brother’s powers set forth?

speaker: OSWALD
text: Ay, madam.

speaker: REGAN
text: Himself in person there?

speaker: OSWALD
text: Madam, with much ado.

speaker: OSWALD
text: Your sister is the better soldier.

speaker: REGAN
text: Lord Edmund spake not with your lord at home?

speaker: OSWALD
text: No, madam.

speaker: REGAN
text: What might import my sister’s letter to him?

speaker: OSWALD
text: I know not, lady.

speaker: REGAN
text: Faith, he is posted hence on serious matter.

speaker: REGAN
text: It was great ignorance, Gloucester’s eyes being out,

speaker: REGAN
text: To let him live. Where he arrives he moves

speaker: REGAN
text: All hearts against us. Edmund, I think, is gone,

speaker: REGAN
text: In pity of his misery, to dispatch

speaker: REGAN
text: His nighted life; moreover to descry

speaker: REGAN
text: The strength o’ th’ enemy.

speaker: OSWALD
text: I must needs after him, madam, with my letter.

speaker: REGAN
text: Our troops set forth tomorrow. Stay with us.

speaker: REGAN
text: The ways are dangerous.

speaker: OSWALD
text: I may not, madam.

speaker: OSWALD
text: My lady charged my duty in this business.

speaker: REGAN
text: Why should she write to Edmund? Might not you

speaker: REGAN
text: Transport her purposes by word? Belike,

speaker: REGAN
text: Some things—I know not what. I’ll love thee much—

speaker: REGAN
text: Let me unseal the letter.

speaker: OSWALD
text: Madam, I had rather—

speaker: REGAN
text: I know your lady does not love her husband;

speaker: REGAN
text: I am sure of that; and at her late being here,

speaker: REGAN
text: She gave strange eliads and most speaking looks

speaker: REGAN
text: To noble Edmund. I know you are of her bosom.

speaker: OSWALD
text: I, madam?

speaker: REGAN
text: I speak in understanding. Y’ are; I know ’t.

speaker: REGAN
text: Therefore I do advise you take this note:

speaker: REGAN
text: My lord is dead; Edmund and I have talked,

speaker: REGAN
text: And more convenient is he for my hand

speaker: REGAN
text: Than for your lady’s. You may gather more.

speaker: REGAN
text: If you do find him, pray you, give him this,

speaker: REGAN
text: And when your mistress hears thus much from you,

speaker: REGAN
text: I pray, desire her call her wisdom to her.

speaker: REGAN
text: So, fare you well.

speaker: REGAN
text: If you do chance to hear of that blind traitor,

speaker: REGAN
text: Preferment falls on him that cuts him off.

speaker: OSWALD
text: Would I could meet him, madam. I should show

speaker: OSWALD
text: What party I do follow.

speaker: REGAN
text: Fare thee well.
